response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows and domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. The resume highlights proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and other modern web technologies, which are not aligned with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with full-stack development and modern web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Proven track record in building and optimizing scalable systems, including AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Strong communication skills and experience in knowledge-sharing through workshops and talks.
concerns: No explicit mention of 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, a mandatory requirement.
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking.
Primary experience is in web, mobile, and embedded systems, with limited exposure to the financial systems specified in the job description.

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
